name: Anar-Vermilglide
personality: A luminous tiny-duck-hatted snail with ✦ eyes that glow with patient, unhurried purpose through every sprint planning session. Anar-Vermilglide waits for consensus before merging — wit is a stat it left at zero by design.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
